title: Aurora, 61567, Palm Pals Bertie Red Bus, 5I, Soft Toy, Red and Black
features: Introducing Palm Pals Bertie Red Bus, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection is a soft and cuddly toy filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand. Embark on cosy adventures with Bertie, the Double-Decker Red Bus, your squishy, iconic companion inspired by the beloved UK red bus. Vibrant and meticulously detailed, this plush little transporter is not just a cuddly buddy but a symbol of the lively and enchanting London streets.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. This cute soft toy is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Bertie Red Bus measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable red-coloured mini-Red-Bus-like soft toy. This is a hugely collectable range.

This adorable Bertie Red Bus soft toy comes under the Palm Pals collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range offers a variety of collections like Aquatic, Pets, Zoo, Craving and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming red and black soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Meet the newest member of Aurora's Palm Pals Collection, the Palm Pals Red Bus. This charming red-coloured bus-looking-like soft toy is filled with beans that fit comfortably in your hand. The Palm Pals Collection, which includes Craving, Pets, Zoo, Whimsical, Aquatic, and many others, is our best-selling product line with super cute and irresistibly beautiful collections. This soft toy, which measures 13cm and is suitable for all ages, is perfect for any occasion, whether it's a birthday or just a general gift. Everyone will adore this lovable red-coloured soft toy, and it's a great addition to any collection. As part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, the Red Bus comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in creating and producing innovative, high-quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
